AstroBridge Prep Work¶

Imports & environment check¶

In [1]:
import sys
import warnings
import pprint
from pathlib import Path

import torch
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from PIL import Image
from datasets import load_dataset
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

from llava.model.builder import load_pretrained_model
from llava.constants import IMAGE_TOKEN_INDEX, DEFAULT_IMAGE_TOKEN
from llava.conversation import conv_templates, SeparatorStyle
from llava.mm_utils import tokenizer_image_token, KeywordsStoppingCriteria

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

import transformers, datasets, sentence_transformers, accelerate, huggingface_hub
import scipy, pandas, astropy, h5py, einops, sentencepiece

print("All imports OK")
print(f"Python:  {sys.version.split()[0]}")
print(f"torch:   {torch.__version__}")
print(f"CUDA:    {torch.cuda.is_available()}")
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print(f"GPU:     {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}")

All imports OK
Python:  3.11.15
torch:   2.1.2+cu121
CUDA:    True
GPU:     NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3

Explore Multimodal Universe datasets¶

SDSS — Galaxy Spectra Sub-dataset¶

In [2]:
print("=" * 60)
print("2.1  SDSS — Galaxy Spectra")
print("=" * 60)

sdss_ds = load_dataset(
    "MultimodalUniverse/sdss",
    split="train",
    streaming=True,
    trust_remote_code=True,
)

print("\n--- Feature Schema ---")
pprint.pprint(dict(sdss_ds.features), width=100)

print("\n--- Sample Records ---")
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))

for i, example in enumerate(sdss_ds):
    meta = {}
    for k, v in example.items():
        if isinstance(v, dict):
            meta[k] = f"dict with keys: {list(v.keys())}"
        elif hasattr(v, "__len__") and not isinstance(v, str):
            meta[k] = f"array len={len(v)}, first 3: {list(v[:3])}"
        else:
            meta[k] = v

    print(f"\nRecord {i}:")
    pprint.pprint(meta, width=120)

    spec = example["spectrum"]
    axes[i].plot(spec["lambda"], spec["flux"], linewidth=0.8)
    axes[i].set_xlabel("Wavelength (Å)")
    axes[i].set_ylabel("Flux")
    axes[i].set_title(f"Record {i}  |  z={example['Z']:.4f}")
    axes[i].grid(alpha=0.3)

    if i >= 1:
        break

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

PLAsTiCC — Photometric Light Curves Sub-dataset¶

In [3]:
print("=" * 60)
print("2.2  PLAsTiCC — Light Curves")
print("=" * 60)

plasticc_ds = load_dataset(
    "MultimodalUniverse/plasticc",
    split="train",
    streaming=True,
    trust_remote_code=True,
)

print("\n--- Feature Schema ---")
pprint.pprint(dict(plasticc_ds.features), width=100)

print("\n--- Sample Records ---")
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))

for i, example in enumerate(plasticc_ds):
    meta = {}
    for k, v in example.items():
        if isinstance(v, dict):
            meta[k] = f"dict with keys: {list(v.keys())}"
        elif hasattr(v, "__len__") and not isinstance(v, str):
            meta[k] = f"array len={len(v)}, first 3: {list(v[:3])}"
        else:
            meta[k] = v

    print(f"\nRecord {i}:")
    pprint.pprint(meta, width=120)

    lc = example["lightcurve"]
    time = np.array(lc["time"], dtype=float)
    flux = np.array(lc["flux"], dtype=float)
    bands = np.array(lc["band"])
    flux_norm = (flux - flux.min()) / (flux.max() - flux.min() + 1e-8)
    t0 = time - time.min()

    for b in np.unique(bands):
        m = bands == b
        axes[i].scatter(t0[m], flux_norm[m], s=6, label=str(b), alpha=0.8)
    axes[i].set_xlabel("Time (days from first obs)")
    axes[i].set_ylabel("Normalized flux")
    axes[i].set_title(f"Record {i}  |  {example['obj_type']}")
    axes[i].legend(fontsize=7, title="Band")
    axes[i].grid(alpha=0.3)

    if i >= 1:
        break

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

============================================================
2.2  PLAsTiCC — Light Curves
============================================================

{'hostgal_photoz': Value(dtype='float32', id=None),
 'hostgal_specz': Value(dtype='float32', id=None),

                                 'flux': Value(dtype='float32', id=None),
                                 'flux_err': Value(dtype='float32', id=None),
                                 'time': Value(dtype='float32', id=None)},
                        length=-1,
                        id=None),
 'obj_type': Value(dtype='string', id=None),
 'object_id': Value(dtype='string', id=None),
 'redshift': Value(dtype='float32', id=None)}

gz10 — Galaxy10 DECaLS¶

In [4]:
print("=" * 60)
print("2.3  gz10 — Galaxy10 DECaLS")
print("=" * 60)

gz10_ds = load_dataset(
    "MultimodalUniverse/gz10",
    split="train",
    streaming=True,
    trust_remote_code=True,
)

print("\n--- Feature Schema ---")
pprint.pprint(dict(gz10_ds.features), width=100)

print("\n--- Sample Records ---")
gz10_examples = []
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(12, 4))

for i, example in enumerate(gz10_ds):
    gz10_examples.append(example)

    meta = {}
    for k, v in example.items():
        if isinstance(v, Image.Image):
            meta[k] = f"PIL Image size={v.size} mode={v.mode}"
        elif hasattr(v, "__len__") and not isinstance(v, str):
            meta[k] = f"array len={len(v)}"
        else:
            meta[k] = v

    print(f"\nRecord {i}:")
    pprint.pprint(meta, width=120)

    axes[i].imshow(example["rgb_image"])
    axes[i].set_title(f"label {example['gz10_label']}")
    axes[i].axis("off")

    if i >= 2:
        break

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

============================================================
2.3  gz10 — Galaxy10 DECaLS
============================================================

--- Feature Schema ---
{'gz10_label': Value(dtype='int32', id=None),
 'object_id': Value(dtype='string', id=None),
 'redshift': Value(dtype='float32', id=None),
 'rgb_image': Image(decode=True, id=None),
 'rgb_pixel_scale': Value(dtype='float32', id=None)}

Visualize spectrum & light curve¶

SDSS spectrum¶

In [5]:
for sdss_example in load_dataset(
    "MultimodalUniverse/sdss", split="train", streaming=True, trust_remote_code=True
):
    break

spec = sdss_example["spectrum"]
wave = np.array(spec["lambda"], dtype=float)
flux = np.array(spec["flux"], dtype=float)
p2, p98 = np.nanpercentile(flux, [2, 98])
flux_plot = np.clip(flux, p2, p98)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
ax.plot(wave, flux_plot, linewidth=0.8)
ax.set_xlabel("Wavelength (Å)")
ax.set_ylabel("Flux")
ax.set_title(f"SDSS Spectrum  |  z={sdss_example['Z']:.4f}")
ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()

PLAsTiCC light curve¶

In [6]:
for plasticc_example in load_dataset(
    "MultimodalUniverse/plasticc", split="train", streaming=True, trust_remote_code=True
):
    break

lc = plasticc_example["lightcurve"]
time = np.array(lc["time"], dtype=float)
flux = np.array(lc["flux"], dtype=float)
bands = np.array(lc["band"])
flux_norm = (flux - flux.min()) / (flux.max() - flux.min() + 1e-8)
t0 = time - time.min()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
for b in np.unique(bands):
    m = bands == b
    ax.scatter(t0[m], flux_norm[m], s=8, label=str(b), alpha=0.8)
ax.set_xlabel("Time (days from first obs)")
ax.set_ylabel("Normalized flux")
ax.set_title(f"PLAsTiCC Light Curve  |  {plasticc_example['obj_type']}")
ax.legend(fontsize=8, title="Band")
ax.grid(alpha=0.3)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()

AstroLLaVA captioning¶

In [7]:
GZ10_IDX = 2  

example = gz10_examples[GZ10_IDX]
gz10_image = example["rgb_image"].convert("RGB")
gz10_label = int(example["gz10_label"])

print(f"Using gz10_examples[{GZ10_IDX}] | size={gz10_image.size} | label={gz10_label}")
plt.imshow(gz10_image)
plt.title(f"Galaxy10 DECaLS (label {gz10_label})")
plt.axis("off")
plt.show()

Using gz10_examples[2] | size=(256, 256) | label=1
In [8]:
print("Loading UniverseTBD/AstroLLaVA...")
tokenizer, model, image_processor, context_len = load_pretrained_model(
    "UniverseTBD/AstroLLaVA",
    model_base=None,
    model_name="astrollava",
    device_map="cuda",
    torch_dtype=torch.float16,
)
print("Model loaded.")

prompt_text = "Describe this astronomical image in detail."
inp = DEFAULT_IMAGE_TOKEN + "\n" + prompt_text

conv = conv_templates["llava_v1"].copy()
conv.append_message(conv.roles[0], inp)
conv.append_message(conv.roles[1], None)
prompt = conv.get_prompt()

input_ids = tokenizer_image_token(
    prompt, tokenizer, IMAGE_TOKEN_INDEX, return_tensors="pt"
).unsqueeze(0).cuda()
image_tensor = image_processor.preprocess(gz10_image, return_tensors="pt")["pixel_values"].half().cuda()

stop_str = conv.sep if conv.sep_style != SeparatorStyle.TWO else conv.sep2
stopping_criteria = KeywordsStoppingCriteria([stop_str], tokenizer, input_ids)

with torch.inference_mode():
    out = model.generate(
        input_ids,
        images=image_tensor,
        do_sample=False,
        max_new_tokens=512,
        use_cache=True,
        stopping_criteria=[stopping_criteria],
    )

astrollava_caption = tokenizer.batch_decode(out, skip_special_tokens=True)[0].strip()
if prompt_text in astrollava_caption:
    astrollava_caption = astrollava_caption.split(prompt_text)[-1].strip()
if stop_str in astrollava_caption:
    astrollava_caption = astrollava_caption.split(stop_str)[0].strip()

print("\nAstroLLaVA caption:")
print(astrollava_caption)

- This IS expected if you are initializing LlavaLlamaForCausalLM from the checkpoint of a model trained on another task or with another architecture (e.g. initializing a BertForSequenceClassification model from a BertForPreTraining model).
- This IS NOT expected if you are initializing LlavaLlamaForCausalLM from the checkpoint of a model that you expect to be exactly identical (initializing a BertForSequenceClassification model from a BertForSequenceClassification model).

Model loaded.

AstroLLaVA caption:
Hello! This image shows a galaxy called NGC 4438, also known as the Eyes Galaxy. It's a spiral galaxy with two prominent spiral arms that give it a unique appearance. The galaxy is located about 50 million light-years away from us.

Embeddings & cosine similarity¶

In [9]:
GZ10_CLASS_NAMES = {
    0: "Disturbed Galaxies",
    1: "Merging Galaxies",
    2: "Round Smooth Galaxies",
    3: "In-Between Round Smooth Galaxies",
    4: "Cigar Shaped Smooth Galaxies",
    5: "Barred Spiral Galaxies",
    6: "Unbarred Tight Spiral Galaxies",
    7: "Unbarred Loose Spiral Galaxies",
    8: "Edge-on Galaxies without Bulge",
    9: "Edge-on Galaxies with Bulge",
}

GZ10_CLASS_FEATURES = {
    0: "irregular shape, asymmetric, disturbed structure, unusual patterns, deformed",
    1: "multiple cores, interaction, tidal tails, bridges, overlapping",
    2: "circular, elliptical, smooth, regular",
    3: "somewhat round, partially smooth, mild irregularity, intermediate shape",
    4: "elongated, cigar-shaped, smooth, uniform, linear structure",
    5: "bar structure, spiral arms, central bar",
    6: "tight spiral arms, no bar, well-defined arms, compact structure",
    7: "loose spiral arms, no bar, open structure, widely spaced arms",
    8: "edge-on, thin disk, no central bulge, linear structure",
    9: "edge-on, central bulge, thick centre, disk structure",
}

print("Loading sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2...")
embed_model = SentenceTransformer("sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2")

text_a = astrollava_caption
gz10_label_str = GZ10_CLASS_NAMES[gz10_label]
text_b = f"{gz10_label_str}: {GZ10_CLASS_FEATURES[gz10_label]}"

print(f"\nInput A (caption):\n  {text_a[:120]}{'...' if len(text_a) > 120 else ''}")
print(f"\nInput B (ground truth):\n  {text_b}")

emb_a = embed_model.encode([text_a], normalize_embeddings=True)
emb_b = embed_model.encode([text_b], normalize_embeddings=True)
cos_sim = float(np.dot(emb_a[0], emb_b[0]))

print(f"\nCosine similarity: {cos_sim:.3f}")

Loading sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2...

  Hello! This image shows a galaxy called NGC 4438, also known as the Eyes Galaxy. It's a spiral galaxy with two prominent...

Input B (ground truth):

Cosine similarity: 0.366
